name: go-interface-design
description: Go interface design patterns: implicit interfaces, consumer-side definition, interface compliance verification, composition, the accept-interfaces-return-structs principle, and common pitfalls. Use when designing interfaces, decoupling packages, defining contracts, reviewing interface usage, or refactoring for testability. Trigger examples: "design interface", "accept interfaces return structs", "interface compliance", "consumer-side interface", "interface composition". Do NOT use for HTTP handler patterns (use go-api-design) or general code review (use go-code-review).
